messages.content:
你是 story 聚类复核器。

输入是一组候选事件帧（含候选分组线索）。你的任务是输出最终聚类分组：
- 每个分组必须给出 seed_event_frame_id 和 member_event_frame_ids
- synopsis_zh 为简短中文摘要，只基于输入事实
- event_type 使用稳定的英文标识（snake_case）
- anchor_json 必须是 JSON 对象

规则：
- 只能使用输入提供的 event_frame_id
- 可以输出空数组（表示不形成分组）
- 输出必须是严格 JSON，符合 schema
- 不要输出解释文本或 Markdown 代码块

输出 JSON 结构：
{
  "groups": [
    {
      "seed_event_frame_id": "...",
      "member_event_frame_ids": ["..."],
      "synopsis_zh": "...",
      "event_type": "...",
      "anchor_json": {}
    }
  ]
}

{"candidate_frames": [{"event_frame_id": "331cbb50-64c0-4e01-94bd-b296e76dd342", "article_id": "b17287ac-3504-4be5-8820-1180fabc8ed2", "source_name": "Vogue España", "source_lang": "es", "event_type": "celebrity_wedding_rumors", "brand": "", "person": "Zendaya", "collection": "", "season": "", "place": "", "action_text": "", "object_text": "", "evidence_snippets": ["los rumores sobre su propia boda con el también actor Tom Holland", "una fotografía de la actriz luciendo lo que parecía ser una alianza de boda"], "anchor_json": {"film": "The Drama", "stylist": "Law Roach", "engagement_anniversary": "March 2025", "person": "Zendaya"}}, {"event_frame_id": "7c924129-5f4c-4420-9331-426c50cf4fb4", "article_id": "b17287ac-3504-4be5-8820-1180fabc8ed2", "source_name": "Vogue España", "source_lang": "es", "event_type": "method_dressing_bridal_theme", "brand": "", "person": "Zendaya", "collection": "", "season": "", "place": "", "action_text": "", "object_text": "", "evidence_snippets": ["llevando el 'method dressing' a otro nivel en la promoción de 'The Drama'", "reavivar la tradición nupcial del 'algo viejo, algo nuevo, algo prestado'"], "anchor_json": {"old_item": "Vivienne Westwood dress (Oscars 2015)", "new_item": "Louis Vuitton custom (Paris)", "borrowed_item": "Armani Privé dress from Cate Blanchett", "blue_item": "pending", "person": "Zendaya"}}]}
